title: TC-FMD-001: Find My Device dialog does NOT re-appear in main settings after denying location during onboarding (single visit)
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app (or clear app data).
2. Launch the app and proceed through onboarding.
3. When the location permission prompt appears during onboarding, tap 'Deny' or 'While Using the App' → select 'Deny'.
4. Complete the rest of the onboarding flow.
5. Once on the main Device screen (main settings), observe the screen for 5 seconds.
6. Navigate away: tap a different tab (e.g., 'Organized' or 'Settings' tab).
7. Navigate back to the main Device screen (tap the device name or home tab).
8. Observe the screen for 5 seconds.
expected: The Find My Device dialog does NOT appear at any point on the main settings screen — neither on first visit after onboarding (step 5) nor on return visit (step 7). The main settings screen displays normally without any unsolicited overlay.

title: TC-FMD-002: Find My Device dialog suppressed after app backgrounding/foregrounding with location denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app (or clear app data).
2. Launch the app and proceed through onboarding.
3. When the location permission prompt appears during onboarding, tap 'Deny'.
4. Complete onboarding and land on the main Device screen.
5. Verify no Find My Device dialog is visible.
6. Press the Home button to background the app.
7. Wait 10 seconds.
8. Re-open the app from the recent apps list (foreground the app).
9. Observe the main Device screen for 5 seconds.
10. Navigate to another tab (e.g., 'Organized'), then return to the main Device screen.
11. Observe the screen for 5 seconds.
expected: The Find My Device dialog does NOT appear after foregrounding the app (step 9) nor after navigating back to the main Device screen (step 11). The denial state persists correctly across the app backgrounding lifecycle event.

title: TC-FMD-003: Find My Device dialog suppressed after app force-kill and relaunch with location denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app (or clear app data).
2. Launch the app and proceed through onboarding.
3. When the location permission prompt appears during onboarding, tap 'Deny'.
4. Complete onboarding and land on the main Device screen.
5. Verify no Find My Device dialog is visible.
6. Force-kill the app (swipe away from recent apps or use 'Force Stop' in device Settings → Apps).
7. Wait 5 seconds.
8. Relaunch the app.
9. Observe the main Device screen for 5 seconds.
10. Navigate to another tab (e.g., 'Organized'), then return to the main Device screen.
11. Observe the screen for 5 seconds.
expected: The Find My Device dialog does NOT appear after relaunching the app (step 9) nor after navigating back to the main Device screen (step 11). The denial state is persisted to disk and correctly restored on app restart.

title: TC-FMD-004: Find My Device dialog suppressed after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect with location denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app (or clear app data).
2. Launch the app and proceed through onboarding.
3. When the location permission prompt appears during onboarding, tap 'Deny'.
4. Complete onboarding and land on the main Device screen.
5. Verify no Find My Device dialog is visible.
6. Disconnect the Bluetooth headset (turn off headset or disable Bluetooth from phone quick settings).
7. Wait 5 seconds.
8. Reconnect the Bluetooth headset (turn on headset or re-enable Bluetooth).
9. Wait for the app to re-establish connection (observe the device name appears in the app).
10. Observe the main Device screen for 5 seconds.
11. Navigate to another tab and back to the main Device screen.
12. Observe the screen for 5 seconds.
expected: The Find My Device dialog does NOT appear after Bluetooth reconnection (step 10) nor after navigating back to the main Device screen (step 12). The denial state is preserved across Bluetooth state transitions.

title: TC-FMD-005: Repeated denial of location permission does NOT cause infinite dialog loop in main settings
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app (or clear app data).
2. Launch the app and proceed through onboarding.
3. When the location permission prompt appears during onboarding, tap 'Deny'.
4. Complete onboarding and land on the main Device screen.
5. Verify no Find My Device dialog is visible.
6. Navigate to the 'Organized' tab.
7. Tap 'Enable now' (or similar CTA that triggers Find My Device setup).
8. When the Find My Device dialog appears, tap 'Deny' or 'Cancel'.
9. Navigate back to the main Device screen (tap device name or home tab).
10. Observe the screen for 5 seconds — the Find My Device dialog should NOT appear.
11. Repeat steps 6-10 for a total of 3 iterations.
12. On the 3rd return to the main Device screen, observe for 10 seconds.
expected: The Find My Device dialog does NOT appear unsolicited on the main Device screen at any iteration (steps 10, 12). The dialog only appears when explicitly triggered from the Organized screen (step 8), and denying it there does not cause it to re-trigger automatically upon returning to main settings. No infinite loop occurs.

title: TC-FMD-006: Find My Device dialog does NOT re-appear in main settings after phone reboot with location denied during onboarding
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app (or clear app data).
2. Launch the app and proceed through onboarding.
3. When the location permission prompt appears during onboarding, tap 'Deny'.
4. Complete onboarding and land on the main Device screen.
5. Verify no Find My Device dialog is visible.
6. Reboot the phone.
7. After phone restarts, launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Observe the main Device screen for 5 seconds.
9. Navigate to another tab and back to the main Device screen.
10. Observe the screen for 5 seconds.
expected: The Find My Device dialog does NOT appear after phone reboot (step 8) nor after navigating back to the main Device screen (step 10). The location denial state is persisted across device reboots.

title: TC-FMD-007: Find My Device dialog does NOT re-appear in main settings when location permission is set to 'Deny' from phone Settings app after onboarding
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app (or clear app data).
2. Launch the app and proceed through onboarding.
3. When the location permission prompt appears during onboarding, tap 'Allow While Using App'.
4. Complete onboarding and land on the main Device screen.
5. Verify no Find My Device dialog is visible.
6. Navigate to phone Settings → Apps → Poly Studio Mobile → Permissions → Location.
7. Set Location permission to 'Deny'.
8. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Observe the main Device screen for 5 seconds.
10. Navigate to another tab and back to the main Device screen.
11. Observe the screen for 5 seconds.
12. Force-kill the app and relaunch.
13. Observe the main Device screen for 5 seconds.
expected: The Find My Device dialog does NOT appear on the main Device screen after changing location to 'Deny' from phone settings (step 9), after navigating back (step 11), or after app restart (step 13). The app correctly detects the denied state and suppresses the dialog.
